Buyer Insight

In the recent quarter, 55% of sales closed over asking price. In competitive neighborhoods, budgeting 5–15% above list is prudent.

Seller Insight

Single family homes are pricing more aggressively — averaging higher over-asking ratios than condos. Strategic pricing near market median drives the strongest competition.
